dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Hey Sam! Do you have a minute? I want to talk about the community event.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Sure! I plan my week on Sundays, so now is good. What's up?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Well, we need to organize the sports day for next Saturday. Can you help me?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Of course! What do we need to do?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: We need to decide on the activities. I was thinking we could have a race and maybe some tennis.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That sounds good! My neighbors play tennis together every week. They will be excited.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect! And we could add a frisbee game too. It's more social.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I like it. Where will the race finish?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: The race finishes here, at the community center. We can hang a banner.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Great! I'll make a list of everything we need today.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Sam! We have a problem. I can't find the documents for the event.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: What documents? The forms for the prizes?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes, and the file with all the details. I left them on my desk, but they're not there now.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Did you take them to the meeting yesterday?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Oh no... I think I did. They could be in my handbag. Let me check.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: The event is tomorrow! We need those forms.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I know, I know. Wait... they're not here either. I feel terrible.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Okay, don't worry. Did you notice anyone near your desk today?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Actually, yes. The cleaning staff were working early this morning.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Maybe they moved the papers? Let's go outside and check the office.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Look! I see the file. It's on the small table near the coffee machine.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Thank goodness! Are all the documents there?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes, everything. The prize forms, the race details, all of it.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: You see? I told you not to worry. Now we can finish organizing everything.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: You're right. I'll be more careful. Should we go over the plan again?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Good idea. So tomorrow, he throws a frisbee at ten to start the games.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Who throws it?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: The mayor. He will throw the frisbee to open the event.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect! Then the race, then tennis, then end with a party. I hope there will be a difference in our community after this.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I hope so too. This will bring everyone together. I'm excited!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Me too. Let's finish the work now, so we can enjoy the party tomorrow.
